A3#3.notes: TrainingBehaviorConfig.use_ap12_calibrated_probs_in_ensemble: bool = True (default). Threaded through score_ensemble.use_ap12_calibrated_probs into _process_single_ensemble_method via new _select_member_probs helper. Members read calibrated_<split>_probs stamped by post_calibrate_model; fall back to raw <split>_probs when stamp absent (legacy / opt-out). RRF force-bypassed regardless of knob (scale-invariant rank fusion per rrf_ensemble docstring). post_calibrate_model stamps calibrated_val_probs / calibrated_test_probs on model + wrapped_model (try/except for slot-only targets). 10 sensors green incl. heterogeneous-scale dominance dampening biz-value test.
